mechanics.excerpt: AMNESIA value: 3 Quite rare in reality but staple of fiction, character with this trait has forgotten who he is and most of his persona histo ry; As such; he has no use of his skills (with the exception of the free skills Language ad Perception) after receiving this trait and must gradually "remember" what he can do_ Exactly how long this takes is Up to the gamemaster; good pace might be to allow the remembrance of one skill at the end of each play session_ most logically skiI the amnesiac either saw being used Or was forced t0 use untrained during the course of the adventure If the player and gamemaster agree the gamemaster can actually create the amnesiac skills and background using the Life Path sO that the player actually has no idea what his char- acter IS capable ot.
